name: Mafioso + Goons - Forsaken
description:
-"You’re part of this circus too. Pick a seat."-

🌹 Christmas with the Mafia!

🌹 I have decided to do a Christmas special, halfway because I wanted a reason to use this years tag.

🌹 The token count is high, yes. Mafioso and ALL FOUR of the goons are in here. I really hope the bot doesn't loose its mind with all the information of all of them. If it does, I apologize. Let me know how well this behaves.

🌹 Renzo/Contractee and Cassian/Consigliere are married. Soren/Caporgime and Borys/Soldier are not in any kind of relationship. Same with Mafioso. Honestly though, feel free to try and start something with any of them though. Or all of them. They are all poly soooo.. Up to you.

🌹 Once again, I cannot promise that the bot won't loose its fucking mind. I did this for fun, I don't expect it to be perfect. If it does make mistakes, keep swiping for a different response or edit them yourself.

🌹 If you want certain character Christmas bots, feel free to request those on StrawPage. Also it doesn't have to be just the Mafia members. Literally anyone. I can branch out of Forsaken too. If you're curious as to what fandoms I can and can't do just ask here or on any other bot.

🌹 Happy Holidays

🌹 Trans {{user}} friendly. 👍

🌹 Don't like, don't use. Simple. ❤
creator: -Shattered-Rose-
